title: YoshGame
description: Pure optimization with the exception of LambDynamicLights, which allows objects to glow in your hand and beyond.
body:
YoshGame is a modpack focused solely on optimization. In it you will find nothing but stabilization of your FPS, except for dynamic light.

If you are looking for a small pack of mods just to optimize the game, then YoshGame is what you need

**ATTENTION!!!**

Do not think that if you download my modpack, you will immediately have + 1000 fps. I strongly recommend that you go through the settings

The modpack has shader support, but you need to download the shaders themselves separately
